title: Meeting New Friends 介绍新朋友
scene: 新同学Lucy来到班级，Anna热情地介绍自己。

lines.en: Hi! You must be the new student. I am Anna.
lines.zh: 嗨！你一定是新同学。我是Anna。

lines.en: Hi Anna. I am Lucy. I just moved here.
I moved from Shanghai. Everything is new to me.
lines.zh: 我从上海搬来。这里的一切对我来说都是新的。

lines.en: Do not worry. Everyone here is very friendly.
lines.zh: 别担心。这里的人都很好。

lines.en: That is good to hear. What do you like to do for fun?
lines.zh: 听到这个真好。你平时喜欢做什么？

lines.en: I like reading and drawing. What about you?
lines.zh: 我喜欢看书和画画。你呢？

lines.en: I love swimming and playing the piano.
Cool! Do you want to sit with me at lunch?
lines.zh: 酷！你想中午和我一起吃饭吗？

lines.en: Yes, I would love that. Thank you, Anna!
